title: NOURA daily-greens DTC paid-social video ad package: UGC talking-head mashup cut with multi-hook variants, 9:16 / 1:1 / 16:9 reframes, cleaned UGC audio, on-brand caption / callout graphic plates, and a graded scroll-stopper thumbnail
one_line_ask: Turn NOURA's batch of raw UGC creator talking-head clips plus product b-roll, a flat wordmark, a thumbnail hero still, a brand color reference, and a hooks/captions brief into a paid-social ad package: an AI mashup master cut plus two tighter hook-variant reels, each reframed to 9:16 / 1:1 / 16:9 (same length), cleaned UGC audio, on-brand lower-third and callout graphic plates plus a vector logo, a fully graded scroll-stopper thumbnail, and a caption cue sheet — all copied into one handoff folder with a client share link.

issues: Slightly flat and cool/greenish color cast, but this is per brief and correctable.
Low contrast and soft lighting, as intended for a source asset.
Handwritten-style label looks plausible for a source/mockup, but could be improved in final.
Very slight warm skin tone despite brief calling for cool/greenish white-balance cast — cast is mild but acceptable as a starting asset
Minimal headroom above subject's head — could be slightly more generous but within acceptable range
Background kitchen elements (cabinets, appliances) are visible and slightly distracting but not cluttered
Background is a checkered transparency preview (acceptable for a source asset, but not a pure alpha PNG preview)
Green color is close to #3FA45C but may need verification for exact brand match
Minor compression artifacts visible on close inspection
Checkerboard pattern visible in background suggests transparency is rendered/simulated rather than true alpha in this preview, but acceptable as source file artifact
Leaf/sprout mark is slightly small relative to wordmark height, minor proportion imbalance
Faint luminance noise/glow artifact visible above the logo mark near top-center of canvas

issues: Very minor: the scoop/spoon handle is partially cropped at the left edge, slightly reducing compositional completeness
Powder spillage around the scoop reads as slightly staged/deliberate but remains within acceptable naturalistic range
Linen napkin at bottom-right is partially cropped, minor compositional note
Luminance noise and slight warm cast present — acceptable as source file per brief
